user_story: As an HR admin, I want to review the list of posted announcements, so that I can verify what has been communicated
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Review Announcements screen; When the page loads; Then existing announcements are listed with their content

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing announcement, so that I can correct or update its content
acceptance_criteria: Given an announcement is listed; When I click Edit and save changes; Then the announcement is updated

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to delete an announcement, so that I can remove outdated communications
acceptance_criteria: Given an announcement is listed; When I click Delete and confirm; Then the announcement is removed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to hide an announcement, so that I can suppress it without deleting it
acceptance_criteria: Given an announcement is listed; When I click Hide; Then the announcement is no longer shown to viewers
